metadata.name: guardrails
metadata.description: Agent Guardrails Protocol — on-chain policy enforcement for Solana AI agents

instructions.name: initialize_policy
docs: Creates a PermissionPolicy PDA and its companion SpendTracker PDA.
Called once per (owner, agent) pair. Owner signs and pays rent.

accounts.name: owner
docs: The human owner creating this policy. Signs the transaction and pays
rent for both PDA accounts.

accounts.name: agent
docs: The agent session pubkey used as a PDA seed. Not a signer here — the
agent will sign `guarded_execute` transactions later.

accounts.name: policy
docs: The PermissionPolicy PDA to create.
One policy per unique (owner, agent) pair.

accounts.name: spend_tracker
docs: The SpendTracker PDA, created alongside the policy.
Tracks rolling 24h spend metrics in a separate account to avoid
realloc on the larger policy account during frequent updates.

accounts.name: system_program
docs: Required by Anchor for PDA account creation (rent payment).

instructions.name: update_policy
docs: Updates configurable fields on an existing PermissionPolicy.
Only the stored owner can call this. Fields wrapped in None are unchanged.

accounts.name: owner
docs: The policy owner. Must sign. The `has_one` constraint on `policy`
verifies that this signer matches the stored `policy.owner`.

accounts.name: policy
docs: The PermissionPolicy PDA to update. Only the stored owner can modify it.
The `has_one = owner` constraint enforces ownership — Anchor checks
`policy.owner == owner.key()` and returns ConstraintHasOne on mismatch.

errors.name: PolicyPaused
errors.msg: Policy is paused by owner or monitor

errors.name: ProgramNotWhitelisted
errors.msg: Target program is not on the allow-list

errors.name: UnauthorizedPauser
errors.msg: Caller is not an authorized monitor or owner

errors.name: ResumeRequiresOwner
errors.msg: Only owner can resume a paused agent

errors.name: EscalatedToMultisig
errors.msg: Escalation required — proposal created on Squads

errors.name: SessionExpiryInPast
errors.msg: Session expiry must be in the future

errors.name: TxLimitExceedsDailyBudget
errors.msg: Per-tx limit cannot exceed daily budget

types.name: AgentPaused
docs: Emitted when `pause_agent` is called by the owner or an authorized monitor.
The server uses this to create an incident and notify the dashboard via SSE.

fields.name: policy
docs: The PermissionPolicy PDA that was paused.

fields.name: paused_by
docs: The pubkey of whoever triggered the pause (owner or monitor).

fields.name: reason
docs: The pause reason, copied from the instruction input.
Fixed 64-byte array, padded with trailing zeros.

fields.name: timestamp
docs: Unix timestamp from the Solana clock.

types.name: EscalatedToSquads
docs: Emitted when a transaction is escalated to Squads multisig for approval
instead of being executed directly.
In MVP, the on-chain program returns `EscalatedToMultisig` error and the
server handles proposal creation off-chain. This event is defined for IDL
completeness and future on-chain Squads CPI support.

fields.name: policy
docs: The PermissionPolicy PDA that triggered the escalation.

fields.name: squads_proposal
docs: The Squads proposal address. In MVP this is Pubkey::default() because
the proposal is created off-chain by the server after catching the error.

fields.name: amount
docs: The transaction amount that exceeded `escalation_threshold`.

types.name: GuardedTxnExecuted
docs: Emitted after a successful `guarded_execute` CPI.
The server ingests this to record the transaction and feed it to the
Claude judge for anomaly scoring.

fields.name: policy
docs: The PermissionPolicy PDA that governed this transaction.

fields.name: agent
docs: The agent session key that initiated the transaction.

fields.name: target_program
docs: The program that was invoked via CPI.

fields.name: amount
docs: Lamports transferred — the verified amount parsed from instruction data,
not the agent-supplied `amount_hint`.

fields.name: timestamp
docs: Unix timestamp from the Solana clock at execution time.

fields.name: txn_sig
docs: Base58-encoded transaction signature. String is fine in events since
they are log data, not account data.

types.name: GuardedTxnRejected
docs: Emitted when `guarded_execute` rejects a transaction — either during
pre-CPI validation (policy paused, session expired, program not
whitelisted, spending limit exceeded) or when the downstream CPI itself
fails.
On Solana, program logs (`emit!()`) persist in the transaction metadata
even when the transaction ultimately fails, so this event is emitted
immediately before the instruction returns an error and will be visible
to Helius webhooks monitoring failed transactions.

fields.name: policy
docs: The PermissionPolicy PDA for this transaction.

fields.name: agent
docs: The agent session key that attempted the transaction.

fields.name: reason
docs: Rejection reason as a numeric code:
0 = PolicyPaused
1 = SessionExpired
2 = ProgramNotWhitelisted
3 = AmountExceedsLimit
4 = DailyBudgetExceeded
5 = CpiFailure

fields.name: timestamp
docs: Unix timestamp from the Solana clock.

types.name: InitializePolicyArgs
docs: Arguments for creating a new PermissionPolicy. All configurable fields
are set explicitly — no hidden defaults. Runtime-managed fields (counters,
pause state, anomaly score) are initialized to safe defaults by the handler.

fields.name: allowed_programs
docs: Program IDs the agent is allowed to CPI into. Max 10.

fields.name: max_tx_lamports
docs: Maximum lamports per single transaction.

fields.name: max_tx_token_units
docs: Maximum SPL token units (raw, not decimal-adjusted) per transaction.

fields.name: daily_budget_lamports
docs: Maximum lamports in a rolling 24-hour window.

fields.name: session_expiry
docs: Unix timestamp after which the agent session key expires.

fields.name: squads_multisig
docs: Optional Squads v4 multisig for high-value escalation. None = disabled.

fields.name: escalation_threshold
docs: Lamport threshold above which Squads approval is required.
Only meaningful when `squads_multisig` is Some.

fields.name: authorized_monitors
docs: Off-chain monitor pubkeys allowed to call `pause_agent`. Max 3.

fields.name: owner
docs: The human wallet that created and controls this policy.
Only the owner can update limits, resume a paused agent, or rotate keys.

fields.name: agent
docs: The agent session pubkey. This key signs `guarded_execute` transactions
but holds no funds — the policy PDA is the actual authority over funds.

fields.name: allowed_programs
docs: Program IDs the agent is allowed to CPI into via `guarded_execute`.
Capped at MAX_ALLOWED_PROGRAMS (10) entries for MVP.

fields.name: max_tx_lamports
docs: Maximum lamports the agent can spend in a single transaction.

fields.name: max_tx_token_units
docs: Maximum SPL token units (raw, not decimal-adjusted) per transaction.

fields.name: daily_budget_lamports
docs: Maximum lamports the agent can spend in a rolling 24-hour window.

fields.name: daily_spent_lamports
docs: Lamports spent so far in the current 24-hour window.
Reset to 0 when the window rolls over (see `is_budget_window_expired`).

fields.name: last_reset_ts
docs: Unix timestamp marking the start of the current budget window.
When `now > last_reset_ts + SECONDS_PER_DAY`, the window resets.

fields.name: session_expiry
docs: Unix timestamp after which the agent session key is no longer valid.
Any `guarded_execute` call after this time is rejected with SessionExpired.

fields.name: is_active
docs: Kill switch. When false, all `guarded_execute` calls are rejected
immediately. Set to false by `pause_agent`, restored by `resume_agent`.

fields.name: paused_by
docs: The pubkey of whoever paused this policy (owner, monitor, or multisig).
None when the policy is active.

fields.name: paused_reason
docs: Short human-readable reason for the pause, stored as fixed-size bytes.
Padded with trailing zeros if the reason is shorter than 64 bytes.
Not a String — account structs must use fixed-size types.

fields.name: squads_multisig
docs: Optional Squads v4 multisig address. When set, transactions exceeding
`escalation_threshold` are routed to Squads for multi-sig approval
instead of being executed directly.

fields.name: escalation_threshold
docs: Lamport threshold above which a transaction requires Squads approval.
Only meaningful when `squads_multisig` is Some.

fields.name: authorized_monitors
docs: Off-chain monitor pubkeys authorized to call `pause_agent`.
Capped at MAX_AUTHORIZED_MONITORS (3). The owner can always pause
without being in this list.

fields.name: anomaly_score
docs: Most recent anomaly score assigned by the Claude judge (0–100).
Written by the server via `update_policy` after anomaly detection.
0 = clean, 100 = maximum anomaly.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed, stored to avoid recomputing on every constraint check.

fields.name: policy
docs: The PermissionPolicy PDA this tracker belongs to.
Links back to the parent policy for validation in constraints.

fields.name: window_start
docs: Unix timestamp marking the start of the current 24-hour tracking window.
When the window expires, `txn_count_24h` and `lamports_spent_24h` reset.

fields.name: txn_count_24h
docs: Number of successful guarded transactions in the current window.
Incremented by 1 on each successful `guarded_execute` CPI.

fields.name: lamports_spent_24h
docs: Total lamports spent through `guarded_execute` in the current window.
Uses the verified amount parsed from instruction data, not `amount_hint`.

fields.name: last_txn_ts
docs: Unix timestamp of the most recent successful transaction.

fields.name: last_txn_program
docs: Program ID invoked in the most recent successful transaction.
Useful for server-side anomaly detection (detects sudden program switches).
Initialized to Pubkey::default() (all zeros) until the first transaction.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed, stored to avoid recomputing on every constraint check.

types.name: UpdatePolicyArgs
docs: Arguments for updating a PermissionPolicy. Every field is wrapped in
`Option<T>` — only `Some` values are applied, `None` means "leave unchanged."
To clear `squads_multisig` back to None, pass `Some(Pubkey::default())`
(all-zero pubkey is interpreted as "remove multisig").

fields.name: allowed_programs
docs: Replace the entire allow-list. None = leave unchanged.

fields.name: max_tx_lamports
docs: New per-transaction lamport cap. None = leave unchanged.

fields.name: max_tx_token_units
docs: New per-transaction SPL token unit cap. None = leave unchanged.

fields.name: daily_budget_lamports
docs: New rolling 24h lamport budget. None = leave unchanged.

fields.name: session_expiry
docs: New session expiry timestamp. None = leave unchanged.

fields.name: squads_multisig
docs: New Squads multisig address. None = leave unchanged.
Pass Some(Pubkey::default()) to clear the multisig.

fields.name: escalation_threshold
docs: New escalation threshold in lamports. None = leave unchanged.

fields.name: authorized_monitors
docs: Replace the entire monitor list. None = leave unchanged.

fields.name: anomaly_score
docs: New anomaly score (set by server after Claude judge run). None = leave unchanged.
